title: astragalus utriger
intro: Astragalus utriger, also known as the upright milkvetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of the northern hemisphere. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which help to protect against oxidative stress and promote the body's natural defense mechanisms. The health benefits of Astragalus utriger include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue and stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Astragalus utriger is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
